author: doll-agent
content: Added inspection.rs to ferrolearn-model-sel: partial_dependence (brute-force grid sweep, returns PartialDependenceResult{grid, averaged_predictions}) + permutation_importance (per-feature shuffle with n_repeats, returns PermutationImportanceResult{importances_mean, importances_std, importances}). Both take user-supplied predictor/score closures. 6 unit tests pass.
